name: Buttermilk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together and stir well until combined.
2. Cover the mixture and let it stand at 70°F (21°C) until it thickens and develops clumps (clabbered).
3. Stir the mixture until smooth.
4. Refrigerate the buttermilk for later use.
5. In recipes that call for sour milk, you may substitute this homemade buttermilk.
